meaning: n.小儿麻痹症,急性骨髓灰白质炎
examples: The authors reported 117 eases about patella-block treatment of genu recurvatum in sequela of poliomyelitis.

Polio (also called poliomyelitis) is highly infectious and affects the nervous system, sometimes resulting in paralysis.
